name: @rune-langium/telemetry-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that ingests anonymised Studio telemetry events and aggregates them in a per-day Durable Object (feature 012-studio-workspace-ux). NO PII, NO IPs, NO file paths. Opt-out, schema-validated.
author: Pradeep Mouli <pmouli@mac.com> (https://github.com/pradeepmouli)
